import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import "../Styles/dashboard.css"; import logo from "../assets/navkar-logo.png"; import profileImg from "../assets/classroom.jpg"; // Using existing asset as placeholder const StudentDashboard = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [user, setUser] = useState({ name: "Student", email: "" }); useEffect(() => { const token = localStorage.getItem("token"); const role = localStorage.getItem("role"); if (!token || role !== "student") { navigate("/"); } // In a real app, we would fetch user details here setUser({ name: "Shah Heval Saurabh", course: "BTech - CSE (Semester - 7)", id: "2203031050600", dob: "16-04-2005", email: "hevalshah2056@gmail.com" }); }, [navigate]); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem("token"); localStorage.removeItem("role"); navigate("/"); }; return (
{/* Header */}

); }; export default StudentDashboard;
